<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>iPhone SC H</title>
<style>
header {background: black;
    color: white;
    padding: 20px;
    text-align: center;
    border-bottom: 3px solid green
}
header h1 {margin: 0;}
body {margin: 0;
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    background: white;}
nav {background: #333;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 10px;}
nav a{color: white;
    margin: 15px;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: bold;
  &:hover {color: #00cc66;}}
.section {padding: 40px;
    text-align: center;}
.cards {display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    justify-content: center;;
}
.card {border: 2px solid green;
    background: white;
    margin: 15px;
    padding: 20px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    width: 250px;
    box-shadow: 5px 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,100);}
.card:hover {transform: scale(1.05);
    transition: 0.3s;}
.card img {width: 150px;}
button {background: #00cc66;
    border: none;
    padding: 10px;
    color: white;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: bold;}
table {width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    background: white;
    border: 1.9px solid green;}
th, td {padding: 15px;
    border: 1px solid green;}
footer {background: black;
    color: white;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px;}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<header style="background-color: black; color: white; padding: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
<img src="img/logo.png" width="300" alt="Logo Iphone SC H" style="margin-right: 15px;">
<div>
  <h1 style="margin=0">Iphone SC H</h1>
  <p style="margin=0">Catálogo de iPhones y Accesorios</p>
</div>
</header>
<nav>
  <a href="#catalogo">iPhones</a>
  <a href="#accesorios">Accesorios</a>
  <a href="#ubicacion">Ubicación</a>
  <a href="#horarios">Horarios</a>
  <a href="#servicios">Servicios y Redes</a>
</nav>
<section id="catalogo" class="section">
  <h2>Modelos de iPhone</h2>
  <div class="cards">
    <div class="card">
      <h3>iPhone 13</h3>
      <img src="https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcT3IaBdaGlKNIn8y5OMFJDQQVDc6r5XLlb0BA&s">
      <p>$700</p>
      <button>Comprar</button>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <h3>iPhone 14</h3>
      <img src="https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSbor3DuIVPPYnypCgCVIJrB8GWGKLJ6_DNJw&s">
      <p>$800</p>
      <button>Comprar</button>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <h3>iPhone 15</h3>
      <img src="https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcQIcFbX-CC1ugTZaxsSyZdHY8LkIHiQXJp_2g&s">
      <p>$900</p>
      <button>Comprar</button>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <h3>iPhone 16</h3>
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,">
      <p>$1000</p>
      <button>Comprar</button>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <h3>iPhone 17</h3>
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,">
      <p>$1200</p>
      <button>Comprar</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
<section id="accesorios" class="section">
  <h2>Accesorios</h2>
  <table>
    <tr>
      <th>Cargadores</th>
      <th>AirPods</th>
      <th>Audífonos</th>
      <th>Fundas</th>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," width="200"></td>
      <td><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," width="200"></td>
      <td><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," width="200"></td>
      <td><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," width="200"></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>$20 <br><button>Comprar</button></td>
      <td>$30 <br><button>Comprar</button></td>
      <td>$30 <br><button>Comprar</button></td>
      <td>$15 <br><button>Comprar</button></td>
    </tr>
  </table>
</section>
<section id="ubicacion" class="section">
  <h2>Ubicación</h2>
  <p>Intersección de la C.5 y Calle Río Morotoco #123, Santa Cruz</p>
  <iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m17!1m12!1m3!1d3067.5373032992634!2d-63.17193792482664!3d-17.754618783196488!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m2!1m1!2zMTfCsDQ1JzE2LjYiUyA2M8KwMTAnMDkuNyJX!5e1!3m2!1ses-419!2sbo!4v1773981302413!5m2!1ses-419!2sbo" width="80%" height="300">
  </iframe>
</section>
<section id="horarios" class="section">
  <h2>Horarios</h2>
  <p>Lunes a Viernes: 8:30 AM - 22:00 PM</p>
  <p>Sábados: 9:30 AM - 20:30 PM</p>
</section>
<section id="servicios" class="section">
  <h2>Servicios y redes</h2>
  <p>Servicio técnico especializado</p>
  <p>Monedas aceptadas: Bs y $</p>
  <p><a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@timedigital28?_r=1&_t=ZS-94wKtR8O1Sf" target="_blank">Tik Tok</a></p>
  <p><a href="https://www.instagram.com/hugo_cespedes.h?igsh=cnJreG9uYm0zMWZr&utm_source=qr" target="_blank">Instagram</a></p>
</section>
<footer>
  <p>Iphone SC H © 2026</p>
</footer>
</body>
</html>
